events.event_description: Establishment of nonresident ambassadorial relations with Maldives. Cecil Burton Lyon, the first U.S. Ambassador accredited to Maldives, presented credentials while resident in Colombo, Sri Lanka.

evidence.quote: Cecil Burton Lyon, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1965-11-10. Credentials presented: 1966-04-09. Left Colombo 1967-06-17. Note: Commissioned during a recess of the Senate; recommissioned on January 27, 1966, after confirmation. Commissioned to the Maldive Islands.
